title: Codex visual review S13 panel a1

observed_literals: same model outputs · two ways to SCORE them · the gap is an artifact
payload.notes: Codex VISUAL second-model review completed (GPT-5.5 xhigh) independent read of S13_panel_a01.png, mode=baked-duo, CLI -i path, RC=0。双人身份锁稳定:executor 为蓝衣棕发无须,reviewer 为绿衣黑发有须,与 identity_refs 一致,identity_consistency=5。像素chibi风格整体统一、配色贴合霓虹基调,style_consistency=5。构图可读、视线导向双列分解对照(same model outputs · two ways to SCORE them · the gap is an artifact),核心数字 1603 / +6.2 / +1.4 / +4.8 与代码字面 json_sanitizer / jsonschema.validate 逐字可读,composition_readability=5。本稿为 baked-duo:baked CJK 气泡与技术图标题 EVALUATOR INTEGRITY、integrity caption 烤字清晰,语义正确、无内容变形 content_corruption_present=false;malformed-output 列内 '{"c' 等截断 JSON 字形为预期内的'恶意/畸形输出'示意,非烤字错误,但其低密度字形边缘略有抖动使整体烤字质量 baked_text_quality=4。粒子与浮动面板边缘轻度伪影 artifact_severity=1。安全区保留 safezone_present=true,面板内无游离模拟字形 stray_text_present=false。与 Gemini 在 identity 上零分歧(disagreeId=0)。整体 KEEP 倾向:身份/构图/核心数字/标题语义全部稳,唯一扣分为 malformed-output 列字形边缘轻抖,不影响 catch beat 的可读性。
